linkedin.text:
Your competitor can match the salary. They can't match the memory.

People forget a number on a payslip within a quarter. They never forget the week the whole team flew to the Adriatic — the one your best engineer still calls the best week of their career.

That's the gap most retention strategies miss. The companies winning the talent war aren't paying the most. They're the ones people talk about — in interviews, over dinner, years later.

At Uproduction (UPE) we design the incentive experiences that turn employees into people who stay, and stories worth telling. From business to pleasure.

If retention is on your agenda this year, let's talk — DM us or book a call.

#IncentiveTravel #TalentRetention #CorporateEvents

facebook.text:
A raise can be matched. A memory can't.

Anyone can offer your best people more money — but no one can copy the week you flew the whole team to the Adriatic and they called it the best of their careers. That's the stuff people stay for.

We design the incentive experiences that turn good teams into loyal ones. From business to pleasure.

What's the one trip your team still talks about? Tell us below — or send us a message to plan the next one.

image_prompt: Aerial twilight shot looking down on thousands of guests gathered across a vast seaside amphitheater-style terrace, tiny figures filling tiered levels facing the open water, warm uplighting washing the stone, the dark sea and a band of deep orange sky beyond, a few boats with running lights scattered offshore. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
